comments.body: @dragon-ai-agent please look at existing seeAlsos in the ontology to get the right syntax

After examining the Uberon ontology, I found that the correct syntax for seeAlso entries is:

\\\

For example:
- \
- \

When referencing other ontology terms:
\\\

For example:
- \
- \

You can also add optional notes to provide context.

Signed by @dragon-ai-agent

After examining the Uberon ontology, I found that the correct syntax for seeAlso entries is:

property_value: seeAlso "URL" xsd:anyURI

For example:
- property_value: seeAlso "https://github.com/obophenotype/uberon/issues/457" xsd:anyURI
- property_value: seeAlso "http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/uberon/docs/The-axial-skeleton" xsd:anyURI

When referencing other ontology terms:
property_value: seeAlso "TERM_ID" xsd:string

For example:
- property_value: seeAlso "GO:0007592" xsd:string
- property_value: seeAlso "UBERON:0012254" xsd:string {notes="abdominal aorta artery"}

You can also add optional notes to provide context.

Signed by @dragon-ai-agent

title: Add COB alignment comment and see_also link to UBERON:0000000
